case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. CHRIS SHELDON et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHELDON, CHRIS $2,127.55 PRINCIPAL, $769.12 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,142.67, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENT OF $100 DUE ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
